Q16 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Match Group-I (Inventory classification) with List-II (Criteria of inventory selection) and select the correct answer using the codes given below the lists:

 
Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
(i) V.E.D Analysis (Vital, Essential, Desirable) is based on criticality of the item.
(ii) S.D.E analysis (Scarce, Difficult, Easy) is based on procurement difficulties.
(iii) X.Y.Z analysis is based on inventory value of items used.

Q18 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

It outlines the planned production activities of the plant. Based on the forecasting and the orders received from the customers/markets, it states the quantity of each product that will be manufactured and the time frame in which they will be manufactured. The given information
talks about which input of the materials requirement planning?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
The master schedule outlines the planned production activities of the plant. Based on the forecasting
and the orders received from the customers/markets, it states the quantity of each product that
will be manufactured and the time frame in which they will be manufactured. The master schedule
divides the planning horizon into a number of weeks. The schedule covers a time frame long
enough to produce the final product. This total production time consists of the sum of lead times
of all the related fabrication and assembly operations of the components and subcomponents.
Master schedules are generated according to demand and without regard to capacity.

Q19 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

An assignment problems is considered to be a special case of transportation problem due to

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
The assignment problem is a special case of the transportation problem in which the objective is to
assign a number of resources to the equal number of activities at a minimum cost (or maximum
profit).

Q20 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Gantt chart DOES NOT provide information about

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
Gantt chart does not provide information about interdependency of jobs. It is a type of bar chart
for illustrating project schedule. Gantt charts illustrate the start and finish dates of the terminal
elements and summary elements of a project.
